strengths: Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, demonstrating hands-on expertise in cutting-edge AI integration technologies
19+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and cloud infrastructure with Staff-level leadership at multiple organizations

Strong entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective (live open-source platform), multiple production open-source projects, and consistent mentorship through workshops and technical community building
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI/ML field despite this being a preferred qualification; AI expertise appears limited to current infrastructure work rather than foundational ML algorithms or deep learning
Resume lacks evidence of strategic customer advisory, cloud product platform strategy involvement, or recognized thought leadership in AI innovation that a Principal role requires
Technical generalist profile across 15+ languages and multiple domains rather than deep specialization in AI and cloud platform strategy

key_factors.factor: Current AI infrastructure expertise at re:cinq
No demonstrated strategic leadership or customer advisory experience

response.justification: Szabo meets baseline requirements with 19+ years of software engineering and an MIT CS degree; his current role in AI-agent infrastructure is highly relevant. However, the Principal position requires Director-level strategic influence and customer-facing advisory on AI adoption, while the resume demonstrates strong technical contribution but limited evidence of strategic leadership, customer advisory, or deep AI specialization. His background is tactically strong but strategically unclear.
